flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Chabot College rose 29% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $4.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Chabot College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Chabot College rose 68% between 2007 and 2010 (8.3k → 14.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Chabot College rose 15% between 2007 and 2010 (19.2% → 22.2%).
